name: 1 v 1000 - Warhammer.
description:
"On a scale of 1 - 10; how badly did we up?"

"Yes."

A bit of a breakup between Umamusme bots for right now. Agnes Digital was supposed to be released today, but I couldn't get it to follow the behavior I gave it, so it's been delayed for now.

In the meanwhile, have fun fighting through what would be considered a 'molehill', in the 40k universe.
creator: Mon3tr007
